untranslatable_reason: This signal requires ranking stocks by month-over-month returns and comparing year-on-year seasonal patterns across S&P 500 constituents. The backtest engine operates on single-instrument indicators (close, sma_*, rsi_*, etc.), not cross-sectional ranking, relative performance comparisons, or multi-asset seasonal pattern detection. The strategy requires: (1) monthly rebalancing logic with comparative ranking across 500+ stocks, (2) year-on-year seasonal pattern matching (requires date arithmetic and historical seasonal lookups beyond indicator scope), and (3) position sizing based on relative rankings. None of the ALLOWED INDICATORS support cross-sectional ranking, seasonal calendar logic, or multi-asset comparison.
translation_notes: Signal is fundamentally a portfolio-level seasonal rotation strategy, not a single-instrument technical trading rule. It requires: month-end detection, cohort ranking, and seasonal regime identification from historical patterns—capabilities outside the scope of the provided indicator library which supports only single-bar technical analysis. To implement this strategy would require custom portfolio construction logic, a seasonal calendar database, and ranking infrastructure not present in the allowed operators and indicators.
